mano_cua.result_summary: Angular8药房管理系统前端可加载，但后端MongoDB未运行（图表显示Cannot retrieve data），左侧导航栏CSS渲染bug（深色背景+深色文字不可见），无法导航到在线商店/结账页面。mano-cua尝试了直接URL路由(/shop,/products等)均被重定向回首页。无法测试Pickup Date功能
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The admin dashboard loads but sidebar navigation links are invisible (dark-on-dark CSS bug). Backend MongoDB is not running so charts show 'Cannot retrieve data'. Tried navigating to /shop, /products, /cart but all redirect to root. Cannot access online store checkout flow to verify Pickup Date field.
